creator: jesper@tam.skriver.dk
text:
Nokia Card Phone not identifed with the /etc/defaults/pccard.conf,
except as a generic modem.

Fix: 

Add the below to /etc/defaults/pccard.conf

# Nokia Card Phone 2.0 (gsm900/dcs1800 HSCSD terminal)
card "Nokia Mobile Phones" "Nokia Card Phone"
	config 0x3 "sio" ?
How-To-Repeat: 
	Insert such a modem in your box.
